hero.title: Your plant has feelings.
hero.subtitle: Are you listening?
hero.description: A smart planter that senses your plant's health and expresses its mood in real time.
hero.badge: Winner — 28th Défi OSEntreprendre 2026, Student Category (MRC de Pierre-De Saurel)

quotes.happy: I'm living my best life right now.
quotes.content: All good here. Don't mind me growing.
quotes.thirsty: My roots are feeling a bit crunchy. Water?
quotes.angry: It is WAY too hot. Maybe move me?
quotes.sleepy: Shhh… dreaming of rain. Good night.

features.label: The Hardware
features.title: More than a Pot. A Companion.
features.description: Built from scratch with custom PCB design, embedded firmware, and a dedicated AI — this is a full hardware + software student project.

precision.title: Precision Sensing
precision.desc: Monitors soil moisture, ambient light (lux), temperature, and humidity 24/7 using calibrated sensors embedded in the custom PCB.

ai.title: AI Plant Personality
ai.desc: Raw sensor data is processed by our API to generate expressive, first-person plant responses — each plant has a unique voice.

app.title: Remote Care App
app.desc: Chat with your plant, trigger watering, view live data, and manage multiple plants from anywhere via our companion mobile app.

appShowcase.label: The Software
appShowcase.title: Monitor, Chat, and Care — All in One App
appShowcase.description: The Plantagoshi companion app gives you full visibility on your plant's environment and lets you interact with it through AI-powered conversations.
features: Real-time sensor data: temperature, luminosity, and water level
24-hour historical graphs with min, average, and max values
AI chat to communicate with your plant via text or audio
Multiple AI personalities to give each plant a unique voice
Multi-plant dashboard to manage all your connected pots

timeline.label: Our Journey
timeline.title: From Wires to Wonder
timeline.description: A student project built over several months of iteration and learning.

kickoff.note: Beginning of the Plantagoshi project. Initial research into IoT plant monitoring, sensor selection, and early software architecture planning.

prototype.note: First working prototype with soil moisture, light, and temperature sensors. 3D-printed enclosure and Raspberry Pi as the main controller.

pcb.note: First custom PCB electrical design. Moved from Raspberry Pi to a dedicated board for better power efficiency and a smaller form factor.

screen.note: Switched to an ESP32 with an integrated screen. The pot now displays its mood directly, with expressive faces reacting to sensor data in real time.

osentreprendreLocal.note: Plantagoshi was selected as the winning project in the Student category at the 28th Défi OSEntreprendre, local level for the MRC de Pierre-De Saurel. Now advancing to the regional Montérégie level.

osentreprendreRegional.note: Plantagoshi was selected as the winning project in the Student category at the 28th Défi OSEntreprendre, regional level for the Montérégie region. Now advancing to the national Quebec level.

team.label: The Makers
team.title: Built by Students, for Plant Lovers
team.description: A passionate team of students from your school combining hardware, software, and a love of plants.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Have a question about Plantagoshi? Want to collaborate or learn more? Drop us a message.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what's on your mind...
contact.note: We'll get back to you as soon as we can.
contact.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you soon.

notFound.message: This page doesn't exist. Maybe your plant wandered off?

cookie.message: We use cookies to improve your experience. No tracking is active by default.
cookie.essentialDesc: Required for the site to function properly.
cookie.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors use our site (Google Analytics).

consent.formAfter: and consent to having my data collected and used as described.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introText: Plantagoshi ("we", "our", "us") is committed to protecting your personal information in accordance with Quebec's Law 25 (Act respecting the protection of personal information in the private sector). This policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your data.
privacy.officerText: The person responsible for the protection of personal information at Plantagoshi is:
privacy.collectionText: We collect the following personal information through our website:
collectionItems: Email address — when you sign up for our waitlist or contact us
Name — when you provide it through our contact form (optional)
Message content — when you send us a message through our contact form
privacy.collectionNote: We do not collect any sensitive information (health, biometric, financial data).
privacy.purposeText: Your personal information is collected for the following purposes:
purposeItems: Responding to your inquiries and messages
Sending you news, updates, and announcements about Plantagoshi
privacy.consentText: We obtain your explicit consent before collecting your personal information. You may withdraw your consent at any time by contacting us. Upon withdrawal, we will stop using your data and delete it upon request.
privacy.storageText: Your data is stored on MongoDB Atlas servers located in AWS Oregon (us-west-2), United States. We implement appropriate security measures including encryption and access controls. Only the co-founders of Plantagoshi have access to your data.
privacy.retentionText: We retain your personal information as long as you maintain your consent. You may request deletion of your data at any time by contacting us.
privacy.rightsText: Under Quebec's Law 25, you have the right to:
rightsItems: Access your personal information held by us
Withdraw your consent at any time
privacy.rightsNoteBefore: We will respond to all requests within 30 days. Contact us via the
privacy.cookiesText: By default, our website does not use any tracking cookies or analytics tools. If you accept analytics cookies through our consent banner, we may use Google Analytics to understand how visitors use our site. You can change your cookie preferences at any time.
privacy.thirdPartyText: We do not share your personal information with any third parties. If this changes in the future, we will update this policy and obtain your consent before sharing any data.
privacy.changesText: We may update this policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.
privacy.automatedText: We do not use automated decision-making processes that affect you based on your personal data.
